title: Megumin Origin
description: An Origin allowing people to destroy everything in a blazing ball of--...ahem...an Origin allowing people to play as Megumin, from Konosuba.
body:
# Megumin Foremost prodigy among Crimson Demons, and definitive glass cannon. There is only one spell that interests her... ### 📚 Driven Megumin gains experience twice as fast. ### 🔻 Small She's still growing, ok? (80% tall) ### 🍖 Ravenous Her appetite is endless, she seems hungry all the time... for destruction. ...but also for food. ....mostly. Mostly for food. ### 🧿 Demonic Incant (Primary Ability) Doing anything or taking enough damage will cancel this ability. Megumin begins chanting... ### ✨The Most Powerful Magic
The sparks of genesis
The embers of oblivion
Past, present, future

The forbidden force that subsumes all creation...

Flame, I am become destruction, unmerciful.

By my blood, by my flesh, commandments set by the old gods are shattered.

Heavens! Earth! You will never forget my name!

I am called Megumin.

Foremost prodigy among Crimson Demons, and master of Explosion Magic.

Behold my power....
## 💥EXPLOOOOSION!! Manifest blazing infinity upon reality, turning all to cinder and dust.
### 💤 She needs help... After Explosion, Megumin can't move, interact, or do anything at all, except eat and sleep. ### 😭 ...so..tired... when she is recovering, Megumin can be carried.
